title: RecommendationSet
description: Collection of recommendations with priority ordering

recommendations.description: Ordered list of recommendations (HIGH -> MEDIUM -> LOW)

llm_available.description: Whether the LLM service was successfully called

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when recommendations were generated

model_used.description: Gemini model used for generation (if available)

error_message.description: Error message if LLM was unavailable
